import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";

const mockRoles = [

const categoryLabels = {
  tenant: "Tenant Management",
  library: "Golden Library",
  ai: "AI & Training",
  system: "System Configuration",
  audit: "Audit & Compliance",
  security: "Security"
};
const categoryColors = {
  tenant: "text-blue-400",
  library: "text-purple-400",
  ai: "text-teal-400",
  system: "text-yellow-400",
  audit: "text-orange-400",
  security: "text-red-400"
};
export default function RolesPermissions() {
  _s();
  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState("roles");
  const [roles, setRoles] = useState(mockRoles);
  const [users, setUsers] = useState(mockUsers);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [selectedRole, setSelectedRole] = useState(null);
  const [showCreateRoleModal, setShowCreateRoleModal] = useState(false);
  const [showEditRoleModal, setShowEditRoleModal] = useState(false);
  const [showPermissionsModal, setShowPermissionsModal] = useState(false);
  const [showAssignUsersModal, setShowAssignUsersModal] = useState(false);
  const [showDeleteConfirmModal, setShowDeleteConfirmModal] = useState(false);
  const [newRole, setNewRole] = useState({
    name: "",
    description: "",
    type: "custom",
    permissions: []
  });
  const handleCreateRole = () => {
    const role = {
      id: `role-${roles.length + 1}`,
      name: newRole.name,
      description: newRole.description,
      type: newRole.type,
      userCount: 0,
      permissions: newRole.permissions,
      createdDate: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      lastModified: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      isSystemRole: false
    };
    setRoles([...roles, role]);
    setShowCreateRoleModal(false);
    setNewRole({ name: "", description: "", type: "custom", permissions: [] });
    alert("Role created successfully!");
  };
  const handleUpdateRole = () => {
    if (!selectedRole) return;
    setRoles(
      roles.map(
        (r) => r.id === selectedRole.id ? {
          ...selectedRole,
          lastModified: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0]
        } : r
      )
    );
    setShowEditRoleModal(false);
    setSelectedRole(null);
    alert("Role updated successfully!");
  };
  const handleDeleteRole = () => {
    if (!selectedRole) return;
    if (selectedRole.isSystemRole) {
      alert("Cannot delete system roles!");
      return;
    }
    setRoles(roles.filter((r) => r.id !== selectedRole.id));
    setShowDeleteConfirmModal(false);
    setSelectedRole(null);
    alert("Role deleted successfully!");
  };
  const handleTogglePermission = (permissionId) => {
    if (!selectedRole) return;
    const hasPermission = selectedRole.permissions.includes(permissionId);
    const updatedPermissions = hasPermission ? selectedRole.permissions.filter((p) => p !== permissionId) : [...selectedRole.permissions, permissionId];
    setSelectedRole({ ...selectedRole, permissions: updatedPermissions });
  };
  const filteredRoles = roles.filter(
    (role) => role.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || role.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );
  const permissionsByCategory = allPermissions.reduce((acc, perm) => {
    if (!acc[perm.category]) acc[perm.category] = [];
    acc[perm.category].push(perm);
    return acc;
  }, {});
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "djv40", _fgB: 1779104381204, _fgD: true, className: "space-y-6", "data-fg-djv40": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:418:5:9999:29053:e:div:xtetxtetxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtxtx:1", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "djv42", _fgB: 1779104381204, className: "flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-djv42": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:420:7:10054:591:e:div:ete", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "djv43", _fgB: 1779104381204, "data-fg-djv43": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:421:9:10114:206:e:div:ete", children: [

_s(RolesPermissions, "+k1vrb1ybq8QlEEJ73vXZjJn6F8=");
_c = RolesPermissions;
function Modal({
  title,
  onClose,
  children,
  size = "medium"
}) {
  const sizeClasses = {
    small: "max-w-md",
    medium: "max-w-2xl",
    large: "max-w-4xl"
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "djv4279", _fgB: 1779104381204, _fgD: true, className: "fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-6", "data-fg-djv4279": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:1093:5:39364:687:e:div:e:1", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
    FGCmp,
    {
      _fgT: "div",
      _fgS: "djv4280",
      _fgB: 1779104381204,
      className: `bg-[#0B1F2A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 w-full ${sizeClasses[size]} max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto`,
      "data-fg-djv4280": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:1094:7:39473:567:e:div:etc",
      children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "djv4281", _fgB: 1779104381204, className: "flex items-center justify-between mb-6", "data-fg-djv4281": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:1097:9:39625:383:e:div:ete", children: [
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "h2", _fgS: "djv4282", _fgB: 1779104381204, className: "text-2xl font-bold text-white", "data-fg-djv4282": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:1098:11:39692:58:e:h2:x", children: title }, void 0, false, {

            lineNumber: 1118,
            columnNumber: 11
          }, this),
          /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
            FGCmp,
            {
              _fgT: "button",
              _fgS: "djv4284",
              _fgB: 1779104381204,
              onClick: onClose,

              "data-fg-djv4284": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:1099:11:39761:232:e:button:e",
              children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: X, _fgS: "djv4285", _fgB: 1779104381204, className: "w-5 h-5 text-gray-400", "data-fg-djv4285": "418.277:473.85:/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx:1103:13:39934:39:e:X::::::TvS" }, void 0, false, {

                lineNumber: 1123,
                columnNumber: 13
              }, this)
            },
            void 0,
            false,

              fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx",

          lineNumber: 1117,

        }, this),
        children
      ]
    },

}
_c2 = Modal;
var _c, _c2;

if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/RolesPermissions.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
